summary: Fantastic audience tape with front‑center Garcia and a soaring Egyptian‑style jam, captured in surprisingly clear sound.
review: All three reviewers rave about the musical fire of this 1986 show – hot Garcia licks, a ten‑minute liquid climax, an exotic mid‑set jam and a standout China Doll, plus an exceptional drum segment. The audience recording, while a bit nasal, puts Jerry’s guitar up front and is praised as sounding better than many soundboard mixes.

ai_rating.rationale: Three consistent 5‑star reviews highlight an outstanding performance and a surprisingly good audience recording; weighting shows (70%) and recording quality (30%) yields a high overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: A bit nasal/tape‑colored but very clear on guitar and drums; reviewers note it beats many soundboard mixes and captures the venue’s size well.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Long, flowing set with a liquid climax around the ten‑minute mark, followed by an Egyptian‑flavored jam deep into the second half and a superb drum segment.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia’s guitar is front‑and‑center, delivering hot licks and clear tone throughout.
band_member_comments.Drums: Exceptionally good drum performance highlighted by reviewers.
